mapper.sql: id ,avatar, user_id, account, login_pwd, nick_name, phone, email, market, type, discount, status, login_limit, login_time, remark, create_time, update_time, login_ip
mapper.select: select count(1) as num from w_user_info where type = 0

select count(1) as num from ( select u.user_id from t_product_info as p left join t_order_info as o on o.order_no = p.order_no left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = o.user_id where date_format(p.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') and date_format(now(), '%Y-%m-%d') >= date_format(p.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') and u.type = 0 group by u.user_id) as t

select COALESCE(count(1), 0) as num from ( select u.user_id from t_product_info as p left join t_order_info as o on o.order_no = p.order_no left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = o.user_id where u.type = 0 and date_format(p.end_time, #{dateStyle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) >= #{dateStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and #{dateStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR} >= date_format(p.create_time, #{dateStyle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) group by u.user_id ) as t
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_user_info (user_id,avatar, account, login_pwd, nick_name, phone, email, market, type, discount, status, login_limit, login_time, remark, create_time, update_time, login_ip) values (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{market,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{loginLimit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_user_info
user_id,
avatar,
account,
login_pwd,
nick_name,
phone,
email,
market,
type,
discount,
status,
login_limit,
login_time,
remark,
create_time,
update_time,
login_ip,
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{market,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{loginLimit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update w_user_info
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_pwd = #{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
market = #{market,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
discount = #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
login_limit = #{loginLimit,jdbcType=INTEGER},
login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
login_ip = #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update w_user_info set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, login_pwd = #{loginPwd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, market = #{market,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, discount = #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, login_limit = #{loginLimit,jdbcType=INTEGER}, login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, login_ip = #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select u.id, u.user_id as userId, u.account, u.nick_name as nickName, u.phone, u.email, u.market, u.type, u.status, u.remark, u.create_time as createTime, u.update_time as updateTime, uf.valid_num as validNum, IFNULL(count(ud.id),0)as discountNum from w_user_info as u left join w_user_finance as uf on uf.user_id = u.user_id left join w_user_discount as ud on ud.user_id = u.user_id where 1 = 1
and (u.account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or u.phone = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or u.email = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and u.status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
and u.remark like '%${remark}%'
and u.nick_name like '%${nickName}%'
and u.create_time >= #{startTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} >= u.create_time
group by u.user_id order by u.create_time desc

select t.* from( select u.id, u.user_id as userId, u.account, u.nick_name as nickName, u.phone, u.email, u.market, u.type, u.status, u.remark, u.create_time as createTime, u.update_time as updateTime, uf.valid_num as validNum, COUNT(CASE WHEN p.product_no is not null THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as productNum from w_user_info as u left join w_user_finance as uf on uf.user_id = u.user_id left join t_order_info as o on o.user_id = u.user_id left join t_product_info as p on p.order_no = o.order_no and (p.status = 2 or p.status = 3) where 1 = 1
and (u.account = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or u.phone = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or u.email = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and u.status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}
and u.remark like '%${remark}%'
and u.nick_name like '%${nickName}%'
and u.create_time >= #{startTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and #{endTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} >= u.create_time
group by u.user_id )as t
order by t.createTime desc
order by t.createTime
order by t.productNum desc
order by t.productNum
order by t.validNum desc
order by t.validNum

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, #{dateStyle}) AS createFmt, DATE_FORMAT(p.end_time, #{dateStyle}) AS endFmt FROM t_product_info p LEFT JOIN t_order_info o ON o.order_no = p.order_no LEFT JOIN w_user_info u ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.type = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, #{dateStyle}) <= #{endTime} AND DATE_FORMAT(p.end_time, #{dateStyle}) >= #{startTime}

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id, DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, #{dateStyle}) AS createFmt, DATE_FORMAT(p.end_time, #{dateStyle}) AS endFmt FROM t_product_info p LEFT JOIN t_order_info o ON o.order_no = p.order_no LEFT JOIN w_user_info u ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.type = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(p.create_time, #{dateStyle}) <= #{endTime} AND DATE_FORMAT(p.end_time, #{dateStyle}) >= #{startTime}
